title: rubus cantabrigiensis
intro: Rubus cantabrigiensis, also known as the Cambridge Bramble, is a species of raspberry native to the British Isles. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in reducing inflammation and acting as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Rubus cantabrigiensis include its ability to aid in wound healing, alleviate pain, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Rubus cantabrigiensis is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions.
